title: Lsn x Looshy CE Pack
description: A Custom Enchant + QOL Resource Pack for server 'lifesteal.net'
body:
![Example Textures ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/011367dfdf5b6afe337227b7125c3b0a06a22f29.png)

  Lifesteal.net Custom Enchant Visuals Pack + QOL
  Overlay for Looshy 16x Resource Pack

**Features**
- Custom Book textures
- Custom Enchanted Item Textures
- Custom Enchanted Armor Model Textures
- Updated to latest season (Season 5)
- Is Legal and allowed on Lifesteal.net


**Requires**
- Variants CIT
